key.name: panel-display-modes
key.summary: Which metrics to show in the panel
key.description: Any combination of: codex-session, codex-weekly, claude-session, claude-weekly. Empty means show nothing.

key.name: panel-percent-mode
key.summary: Whether panel values show remaining or used percentage

key.name: panel-label-mode
key.summary: Deprecated: single-metric panel selection from pre-1.1 releases
key.description: Kept for migration only; a stored specific metric is carried over to panel-display-modes on first run. Options: min, claude-session, claude-weekly, codex-session, codex-weekly
